parts.name: AT120 Door Operator Assembly
parts.desc: Complete AT120 door operator for Gen2 passenger elevators. Includes motor, belt, and controller.

parts.name: DCSS5 Door Operator Assembly
parts.desc: DCSS5 center-opening door operator. Variable speed, quiet operation. Fits Gen2 and SkyRise.

parts.name: Door Hanger Roller Set
parts.desc: Set of 4 nylon door hanger rollers. 7-7/8 inch diameter. Otis ref: 456CL4.

parts.name: Door Gibs - Nylon (Set of 4)
parts.desc: Replacement nylon door gibs for hoistway doors. Low-friction, quiet operation.

parts.name: Door Interlock Assembly
parts.desc: 6940 series hoistway door interlock. Includes contacts and mechanical lock mechanism.

parts.name: Pickup Roller Assembly
parts.desc: Car door pickup roller assembly. Engages hoistway door vane for coupled operation.

parts.name: Roller Guide Shoe Assembly
parts.desc: Complete roller guide shoe assembly for car frame. 3-roller design with spring-loaded tensioner.

parts.name: Guide Shoe Insert Set
parts.desc: Set of 6 nylon guide shoe inserts (liners). Standard 211 profile. Easy snap-in replacement.

parts.name: Roller Guide Wheel 2.2 inch
parts.desc: Individual roller guide wheel. 2.20 x 7/8 inch, 0.370 bore. Otis ref: 456CA1A.

parts.name: Car Station Push Button - Single
parts.desc: Series 18 surface mount single push button. Illuminated, vandal-resistant. Brushed stainless.

parts.name: Car Station Push Button - Double
parts.desc: Series 18 surface mount double push button assembly. Illuminated, vandal-resistant.

parts.name: Hall Lantern Indicator
parts.desc: LED hall lantern with direction arrows and chime. Surface mount. Satin finish.

parts.name: Position Indicator Display
parts.desc: Digital floor position indicator. LED matrix display. Supports up to 50 floors.

parts.name: GCB Main Control Board
parts.desc: GCB main processor board (GBA26800LB20). Core controller for Gen2 elevator systems.

parts.name: LCB2 Landing Control Board
parts.desc: LCB2 landing call controller board. Manages hall calls and dispatching per floor.

parts.name: Door Control Board DAA
parts.desc: Door control PCB (DAA26801C series). Manages door operator speed profiles and safety edge.

parts.name: Governor Assembly
parts.desc: Overspeed governor assembly. Trips safety gear at 115% rated speed. Includes rope and tension weight.

parts.name: Safety Edge - Mechanical
parts.desc: Mechanical leading edge safety device for car doors. Triggers door reopening on obstruction.

parts.name: Light Curtain Detector
parts.desc: Infrared light curtain door protection system. 2D detection array. Replaces mechanical safety edges.

parts.name: Governor Rope 3/8 inch (per foot)
parts.desc: 3/8 inch governor rope. Galvanized steel, 6x19 construction. Sold per linear foot.
